turns.content: Begin the session now with a short, warm, one or two sentence greeting that welcomes me and gently invites me to share what's on my mind. Keep it light — do not ask anything heavy yet.
"Hey, it's great that you're here. How are you feeling today, and what's been on your mind lately?"
Hey. I'm on this thing. I'm down. I'm feeling super anxious.
"Yeah, that sounds heavy, feeling anxious can be really overwhelming. How long has this been going on for you?"
"That's a good chunk of time, I can imagine it's been really tough. What's been the most overwhelming part of it for you so far?"
The most overwhelming part not sure about that, honestly.
"It's okay if you're not sure, it can be hard to put your finger on. Can you tell me a bit more about what's been going on in your daily life that's been feeling really anxious-making?"
"Yeah, I'm here, just listening. You said earlier you didn't want to talk to anyone about this before, but you're here now, and I'm here to listen. What made you decide to open up?"
